title: 21:01 â January 8, 2021
body_text:
21:01 â January 8, 2021
Updates to the Funds Transfers Part and International Bank Account (IBAN) Countries Form
We updated the Funds Transfer Part to clarify the deadline for outgoing wires flagged for compliance review. We also explain why wires sent via MTS may not immediately appear in the MTS Outbox.
We updated the International Bank Account Number (IBAN) Countries, Form 9252, to add the IBAN information for Libya and describe the IBAN validation process in the Wires application.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Funds Transfers Part
Section 11.6, Deadlines for Outgoing Transfers
We added a note to the Outgoing Transfer Deadlines table clarifying that wires sent after 6:00 pm ET requiring a manual compliance review will not be released until the morning of the following business day.
Section 13.5, Viewing Outgoing Transfers on MTS
We added an explanation of why an outgoing wire sent via MTS may not immediately appear in the MTS Outbox.
Document Library
Status
International Bank Account Number (IBAN) Countries
9252
We added the IBAN information for Libya.
We described the IBAN validation process. We also clarified that the Wires application will not prevent wires with incorrectly entered or missing IBANs from being sent.
Revised
